zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Malbank於大約1169年出生在英國奧可福爾希阿丁頓時，她的父親William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank45歲，母親Andilicia de Beauchamp16歲。她於1177年與Thomas Basset Lord of Headington在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1225年在英國爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa Malbank于大约1169年出生在英国奧可福爾希阿丁頓时，她的父亲William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank45岁，母亲Andilicia de Beauchamp16岁。她于1177年与Thomas Basset Lord of Headington在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1225年在英国爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Malbank
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Malbon  .

variants.name: Malbon
meanings: English (Staffordshire): nickname or habitational name from Norman French Malbanc, which may be from Old French mal banc ‘bad bench’, but if so the reason for the use of this expression as a surname is unknown. Possibly it derives from a lost placename, in which banc may mean ‘steep crag’. The second part of the name, -banc, survives in Maybank , but medieval forms in -ban(e), -bon(e), or -bun are also common and are sometimes later re-interpreted as -born and -bourne, leading to confusion with Melbourne .

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Malbank was born about 1169, in Headington, Oxfordshire, England, her father, William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank, was 45 and her mother, Andilicia de Beauchamp, was 16. She married Thomas Basset Lord of Headington in 1177, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 8 daughters. She died in 1225, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Malbank est née environ 1169, à Headington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Andilicia de Beauchamp, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Basset Lord of Headington en 1177, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1225, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Malbank um 1169 in Headington, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank 45 und ihre Mutter Andilicia de Beauchamp 16. Sie hat 1177 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Basset Lord of Headington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1225 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Malbank è nata il circa 1169 nel Headington, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Andilicia de Beauchamp, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Basset Lord of Headington nel 1177, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1225, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Malbankが約1169年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘディントンで生まれた時，父William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbankは45歳，母Andilicia de Beauchampは16歳であった。1177年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでThomas Basset Lord of Headingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1225年にイギリスチェシュアイアで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Malbank(이)가 대략 1169년 영국 스퍼드실르 헤딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Andilicia de Beauchamp(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1177년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Thomas Basset Lord of Headington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 영국 체실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Malbank nasceu aproximadamente 1169, em Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Andilicia de Beauchamp, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Basset Lord of Headington em 1177, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1225, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Malbank родилась около 1169 г. в местности хидингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Andilicia de Beauchamp, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Basset Lord of Headington в 1177 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1225 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa Malbank nació aproximadamente 1169, en Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Andilicia de Beauchamp, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Thomas Basset Lord of Headington en 1177, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 8 hijas. Murió en 1225, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
